reviews.name: s****
reviews.content:
킁킁거리면서 간식 찾는 게 너무 귀여워요🙊
한 장난감 안에 노즈워크, 삑삑, 바스락까지 모두 들어있어 쉽게 질려하지 않고 오래 갖고 놀아요! 
집에 강아지 혼자 놔둬야 할 때 주고 나가기 딱 좋은 장난감이에요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute watching him sniff around looking for treats🙊 This one toy has nose work, squeakers, and crinkly sounds all in one, so he doesn't get bored easily and plays with it for a long time! It's the perfect toy to give him when you have to leave your dog alone at home.

reviews.name: 이밍구
reviews.content:
기존 노즈워크북 5개를 정복한지 오래라 그런지 
새로운 봉봉그린 스너피북을 너무너무 좋아해요 !!
입과 코에 직접 닿는 면이니 에코프렌들리 봉봉그린에서 만든 것도 믿음직스럽고, 
무엇보다 사과에서 나오는 애벌레가 정말 귀엽답니다~ㅎㅎ
바잇미 다른 노즈워크 장난감과 스몰바이트 같이 주면 40분도 거뜬히 잘 논답니다 !!!
reviews.content_en: He's conquered 5 of the regular nose work books already, so he absolutely loves this new BONG BONG GREEN Snuffy Book!! Since it directly touches his mouth and nose, I trust that it's made by eco-friendly BONG BONG GREEN, and the little worms that come out of the apple are seriously adorable~ㅎㅎ When I give him this together with other BITE ME nose work toys and SMALL BITE, he easily plays for 40 minutes!!!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 강아지가 너무 좋아해요 바스락거리는 소리가 나서 재밌나봐요 자기 몸통만한걸 하루종일 물고다녀요 출근전에 가볍게 빨리 간식 넣어서 노즈워크 해주기도 딱 좋아요! 안에 삑삑이 장난감도 달려있었는데 그게 너무 좋은지 어느날 보니 물어뜯어서 삑삑이만 따로 물고다니더라고요 책을 하도많이 가지고 놀아서 곧 하바드 가겠어요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it so much! He seems to find the crinkly sound fun and carries around something as big as his own body all day. Before work, it's perfect for quickly stuffing treats inside for a quick nose work session! There was also a squeaky toy attached inside, and he loved it so much that one day I caught him chewing it off and carrying just the squeaker around. He plays with the book so much, he's about to get into Harvard 😄

reviews.name: 테****
reviews.content: 노즈워크북 넘 귀여워오 간식 숨겨주기도 편하고 귀어워요! 강아지가 정말정말 좋아합니다💛🥹
reviews.content_en: The nose work book is so cute🥰 It's easy to hide treats in and adorable! My dog absolutely loves it💛🥹

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
귀여워요.
컬러도 차분하니 넘 예쁘구요.

외출할 때 학습지(!) 숙제내주고 가는데,
저희집 아가는 겁이 많고 지능이 높은 편이 아니라
난이도 높으면 문제를 잘 못 풀어요^^;
식탐 많은 아가임에도 블구하고요.
이건 어렵지 않아서 저희집 아가도 나름 쉽게(?) 재밌게(!)
숙제 잘할 것 같아요 :)
만족스러운 제품이에요!
reviews.content_en: It's cute. The colors are calm and really pretty too. I give it to him like homework when I go out (!), but my pup is timid and not particularly smart, so he struggles with higher difficulty levels^^; Even though he's very food-motivated, this one isn't too hard so my pup seems to find it pretty easy(?) and fun(!) doing his homework :) It's a satisfying product!

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content:
난이도가 쉬운편이라 노즈워크 못하는 강쥐들도 쉽게 할 수 있을것 같아요!
마냥 어려우면 중간에 포기하는데 이 친구는 난이도가 적절하게 조절된 느낌!!
노즈워크 어려워하는 강쥐들 이걸로 시작해보세요~!굳굳~
reviews.content_en: Since the difficulty level is on the easier side, even dogs that struggle with nose work should be able to do it easily! If something's too hard, they give up halfway through, but this one feels like the difficulty is appropriately adjusted!! If your pup struggles with nose work, start with this one~! Highly recommend~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 우선 봉봉그린 장난감을 잘 가지고 놀아서 같은 재질의 노즈워크북이라서 구매했어요 결론은 매우 좋아합니다
reviews.content_en: He was already playing well with BONG BONG GREEN toys, so I bought this nose work book since it's made of the same material. Bottom line: I'm very happy with it.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 난도가 높지는 않은데 너무 귀여워서 샀어요!
reviews.content_en: The nose work difficulty isn't too high, but I bought it because it's so cute!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content_en: He loves it when I put treats in lol

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 이제 날도 추워지고 눈까지 내리면 산책 진짜 안 하려고 해서 노즈워크 장난감을 미리 준비하고 있는데 너무 귀여워 보여서 구매했어요!
reviews.content_en: Now that it's getting cold and snowing, he really doesn't want to go for walks, so I'm preparing nose work toys in advance. I bought this one because it looks so cute!

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 이제 날도 추워지고 눈까지 내리면 산책 진짜 안 하려고 해서 노즈워크 장난감을 미리 준비하고 있는데 너무 귀여워 보여서 구매했어요!
reviews.content_en: Now that it's getting cold and snowing, he really doesn't want to go for walks, so I'm preparing nose work toys in advance. I bought this one because it looks so cute!

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
오랜만에 노즈워크 장남감 구입
4살 생일에 생일선물로 준비했어요~
보자마자 바스락 소리에 날뛰네요 삑삑이도 있고 나름 알차네요
4살 아이에겐 너무 쉬어서 순삭인게 단점ㅠ
reviews.content_en: Bought a nose work toy after a while. Got it as a birthday gift for his 4th birthday~ He goes crazy at the crinkly sound right when he sees it. It has a squeaker too and it's pretty well-made. The downside is it's too easy for a 4-year-old pup, so he destroys it instantly ㅠ

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content_en: He's kind of a nose work dummy, but he found this more challenging than expected, which was surprising!

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 공부 좀 하라고 주문했어요 귀여워요 장난감은 항상 바잇미 것만 사요
reviews.content_en: Ordered it to make him do some brain work😄 It's cute. I always only buy BITE ME toys for him.
